basic_details.job_title: OAV Fatamunda Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Chowkidar and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Warden, Head Cook, Chowkidar and Assistant Cook Posts
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Fatamunda has released the official Various Posts Notification 2026 at the official website subarnapur.odisha.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the OAV Fatamunda Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 19 to 60 years (post-wise age limit applicable) with qualifications such as Graduate, 10th Pass, and relevant experience in cooking/hostel management can apply offline up to 15 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application form link are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Warden: Minimum 30 years, Maximum 60 years. Head Cook: Minimum 30 years, Maximum 40 years. Assistant Cook: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 32 years. Chowkidar -cum- Sweeper: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 32 years.

qualification.details: Warden: Graduate (BA/BSC) with Minimum 2 years of hostel management experience. Head Cook: Good Cooking Experience. Must know LPG usage, experienced in cooking, must be clean and tidy. Assistant Cook: Good Cooking Experience. Must know LPG usage, experienced in cooking, must be clean and tidy. Chowkidar -cum- Sweeper: 10th Pass.

salary_details.pay_scale: Warden: Rs. 19904, Head Cook: Rs. 10000, Assistant Cook: Rs. 6750, Chowkidar: Rs. 3400
salary_details.details: Warden: Rs. 19904 Head Cook: Rs. 10000 Assistant Cook: Rs. 6750 Chowkidar -cum- Sweeper: Rs. 3400

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://oav.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Fatamunda recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the OAV Fatamunda recruitment is 15 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for various posts at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Fatamunda. These include positions like Warden, Head Cook, Assistant Cook, and Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post is a 10th pass from a recognized board or institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Warden post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Warden post is between 30 to 60 years. Candidates falling within this age bracket are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via registered post or speed post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Head Cook position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Head Cook position will receive a salary of Rs. 10000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any experience required for the Assistant Cook post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates applying for the Assistant Cook post must have good cooking experience and knowledge of LPG usage. They should also be clean and tidy.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Fatamunda, which is https://oav.edu.in/OAVFTM, or from the District website https://subarnapur.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an interview. Candidates who are shortlisted will be called for an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other districts apply?
faq.answer: No, applications from candidates of other districts will not be considered. The recruitment prioritizes candidates from the local locality, nearby blocks, or districts.
